summary: The diff implements all four major requirements (REQ-6 through REQ-10) with strong coverage. The Top100Dashboard, Top100FilterBar, PriceProjectionsSection, useQueries hooks, dark theme, and sticky header are all present and correctly structured. Minor gaps exist around explicit confirmation of certain acceptance criteria details, but overall implementation is comprehensive.

missing_requirements.requirement: All previous dashboard components (Top150Dashboard, MultiCryptoDashboard, etc.) are removed from the rendered page — legacy components like ICPDashboard, MultiCryptoDashboard, Top50Dashboard still appear referenced in frontend-file-summaries.txt without indication they were cleaned up or emptied
missing_requirements.reason: The build request constraint says empty legacy component files should be cleaned up or left empty. The file summaries still reference Top50Dashboard and other legacy components as active feature files without evidence of cleanup.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer component with caffeine.ai attribution link and UTM parameters
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a Footer component or any caffeine.ai attribution. The diff adds a Footer imported in App.tsx and referenced in frontend-file-summaries.txt with caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM params.

hallucinated_features.description: Auto-refresh 60s label badge displayed in the sticky header
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires the header to show 'Crypto Tracker AI' branding with a pulsing live badge. The diff adds an additional 'Auto-refresh 60s' badge element that was not specified.
